brand_identity.name: Lumina LMS
brand_identity.description: A dark-mode first learning platform that prioritizes deep focus and content clarity.

effects.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground border-white/10

Card.wrapper: rounded-xl border border-white/5 bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm overflow-hidden relative group

Input.base: flex h-11 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-black/20 px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all focus:border-primary/50

Sidebar.container: h-screen w-64 bg-background border-r border-border flex flex-col fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-40
Sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-colors hover:bg-white/5 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text has at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the dark background. Use lighter grays (e.g., Zinc-200) for body text, not dark gray.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements MUST have a visible ring/border on focus. Use 'ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2 ring-offset-background'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Apply the dark theme colors to 'tailwind.config.js' first. Do not assume default Shadcn colors.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css' top. Update 'tailwind.config.js' fontFamily.
4. COMPONENTS: When building the dashboard, use the 'Bento Grid' layout. Do not create a generic list.
5. AUTH: For the login page, use a split layout: Left side = Branding/Hero Image (Use the 'hero_image' from assets), Right side = Login Form.
6. PLAYER: For the Course Player, use a 'Cinema Mode' approach: Dark background, video takes center stage, sidebar is collapsible.
7. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and links.
8. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders like 'via.placeholder.com'.
universal_guidelines: Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for headers and modals.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
